title: Fix TUI panic on unchecked render/event paths
description: The terminal browser can panic with index out of bounds during interactive use. Harden unchecked render indices and fix event handling so one poll consumes one event.
close_reason: Fixed unchecked render/event paths and verified with cargo fmt/test

title: GFF3: parser, feature store, gene jump
description: Add noodles-gff, parse GFF3 into feature index, jump-to-gene by name/ID, render features track in TUI

title: Core modules: cli, app, error, region
description: Scaffold cli.rs, app.rs, error.rs, region.rs with types and parsers

title: Cargo.toml: add all dependencies
description: Add noodles, ratatui, crossterm, clap, anyhow, thiserror to Cargo.toml

title: Add terminal screenshot capture
description: Add an in-app keybinding to save the current ratatui screen as a timestamped text screenshot file for sharing/debugging.
close_reason: Added s keybinding to save current ratatui screen to screenshots/locus-<timestamp>.txt and documented it

title: Clarify TUI top status bar
description: Make the top bar easier to scan by using consistent labeled fields and avoiding crowded status text.
close_reason: Top status bar now uses consistent labels, explicit scale/read metrics, and truncation for narrow terminals

title: Render model and pileup layout
description: cache.rs + render/: RenderRead, row-packing, coverage binning

title: BAM source: open file, index, header
description: bam.rs: BamSource struct, open BAM+index, parse header, fetch reads

title: Polish screenshot export filenames and docs
description: Avoid timestamp collisions when saving screenshots and update documentation to reflect both ANSI text and HTML screenshot outputs.
close_reason: Screenshot filenames now include millisecond precision plus process id, and README describes both text and HTML outputs

title: Export HTML screenshots
description: Screenshots should include an HTML artifact that preserves ratatui cell colors in browsers and editors, while keeping the existing text screenshot export.
close_reason: Added HTML screenshot export alongside ANSI text screenshots with tests for styling and escaping.

title: Preserve colors in text screenshots
description: Text screenshots currently write only buffer symbols and discard ratatui cell styles. Emit ANSI SGR escape codes by default so catting a screenshot in an ANSI-aware terminal preserves colors.
close_reason: Text screenshot export now emits ANSI SGR styling by default and tests cover colored output.

title: TUI: layout, widgets, keyboard nav
description: ui.rs, events.rs, layout.rs: ratatui app loop, all keybindings

title: Tests: region parser, pileup, coverage
description: Unit tests for region parser, bp-to-col, row packing, coverage
